backstory.original: Grimm's immense strength and steadfast loyalty make him the perfect partner for Beadle's clever schemes. A giant in both stature and courage, Grimm is as at home smashing through foes as he is keeping the Giant's Bane Tavern running smoothly.
backstory.display: 格林具有强大无匹的力量和矢志不渝的忠诚，也因此成为比德尔精妙计划的完美搭档。论身材，他魁梧壮硕如同巨人；论勇气，他勇往直前无所畏惧。他既能轻松击溃敌人，也能把“巨人的祸根”打理得井井有条。

description.original: Grimm cleaves through the nearest enemies with his two enormous greatswords.
description.display: 格林用他的两把巨剑顺劈距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Grimm attacks the enemy with the most health and knocks back other enemies in a small area.
description.display: 格林攻击生命值最高的敌人，并将小范围内的其他敌人击退。

longDescription.original: Grimm attacks the enemy with the most health and knocks back other enemies in a small area. In non boss areas, a Frost Giant spawns in revenge.
longDescription.display: 格林攻击生命值最高的敌人，并将小范围内的其他敌人击退。在非首领区域，会刷新一只霜巨人进行复仇。

description.desc: Beadle & Grimm are so inseparable that if either one qualifies for an adventure restriction based on their tags, ages, ability scores, etc., then both can be used.
比德尔和格林密不可分，如果根据他们的标签、年龄、能力分数等，其中任何一个符合冒险限制条件，那么两个都可以使用。
If Beadle is in the formation, all of Grimm's equipment item levels are increased by Beadle's base average item level.
如果比德尔在阵型中，格林的所有装备物品等级都会随着比德尔的基础平均物品等级而增加。

Each time Grimm attacks an enemy his base attack cooldown is reduced by 0.2 seconds and he deals $amount% more damage, stacking up to 25 times. Damage bonus stacks multiplicatively, while the base attack cooldown stacks additively. Stacks reset upon changing areas, unless Moving Right Along is triggered.
每次格林攻击敌人，他的基本攻击冷却时间缩短 0.2 秒，并多造成 $amount% 的伤害，最多堆叠 25 次。伤害加成以乘算方式堆叠，而基本攻击冷却缩短的时间以加算方式堆叠。改变区域时重置堆叠，除非触发了“继续前进”。

tipText.original: Each time Grimm strikes, his attacks quicken and his damage intensifies, lasting until he moves to a new area.
tipText.display: 格林每次出击时，攻击速度都会加快，伤害也会增强，持续到他移动到新的区域为止。

description.desc: Each time Grimm attacks an enemy and breaks at least one armor or segmented health, he breaks 1 more on all subsequent attacks, stacking additively up to 5 times. Stacks reset upon changing areas, unless Moving Right Along is triggered.
每次格林攻击敌人并击破至少一层护甲或分段式生命值时，他随后的所有攻击都会再击破一层，最多可以加算方式堆叠 5 次。改变区域时重置堆叠，除非触发了“继续前进”。

tipText.original: Grimm's attacks progressively break through more armor or segmented health. His bonuses last until changing areas, or may persist longer if the party advances quickly.
tipText.display: 格林的攻击会逐步击破更多的护甲或分段生命值。他的加成效果会持续到改变区域为止，如果队伍前进速度很快，加成效果可能会持续更长时间。

description.desc: Grimm leaps into the fray, brutally slashing the enemy with the most health and knocking back all other enemies in a small area. Afterwards, if you're not in a boss area, a Frost Giant spawns in revenge.
格林跃入战场，残忍地砍杀生命值最高的敌人，并将小范围内的其他敌人击退。之后，如果你在非首领区域，会刷新一只霜巨人进行复仇。
If the party completes a new area within 15 seconds of entering it, Grimm's Get Buff and Break Their Will stacks do not reset upon entering the next area.
如果探险队在进入一个新区域后的 15 秒内完成该区域，那么格林的“获得增益”和“粉碎其意志”堆叠在进入下一个区域时不会重置。

Grimm gains the Hunter role, and Giants become his Favored Foe. Grimm deals $amount% more damage against his Favored Foe, and all boss enemies also count as Giants for the purposes of all abilities that care about such things.
格林获得了猎人角色定位，巨人成为了他的偏好对手。格林对“偏好对手”会额外造成 $amount% 的伤害，而且在使用所有相关技能时，所有首领敌人也都算作巨人。

specializationDescription.original: The bigger they are, the harder they fall.
specializationDescription.display: 他们的体型越庞大，摔倒的时候就越痛。

description.desc: Grimm taunts all enemies he attacks, causing them to switch targets and attack him. For each enemy that has attacked him in the current area, his damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively up to 100 times.
格林会嘲讽他攻击的所有敌人，使其转换目标并攻击他。在当前区域内，每有一名敌人攻击过他，他的伤害就会增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多 100 倍。

specializationDescription.original: The only problem with taunting giants is that they sometimes hear you.
specializationDescription.display: 嘲讽巨人唯一的问题在于，他们有时候会听到你的嘲讽。

description.desc: Grimm gains the Gold Find role. Enemies that Grimm defeats drop $(not_buffed amount)% additional gold for each enemy he has defeated in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at 20.
格林获得了金币寻获角色定位。在当前区域内，格林每击败一名敌人，他所击败的敌人就会掉落 $(not_buffed amount)% 的额外金币，以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 20。

specializationDescription.original: The Giant's Bane Tavern wasn't built on good intentions — it was built on giant treasure.
specializationDescription.display: “巨人的祸根旅店”可不是基于善意而建的——它是靠巨人宝藏建成的。

description.desc: Grimm increases the health of all other Champions by 25% of his max health and any healing effect on those Champions is increased by 25%.
格林增加其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于他最大生命值的 25%，并且针对这些勇士的所有治疗效果提高 25%。

When Beadle uses his ultimate ability in the same party as Grimm, Grimm's ultimate ability goes on cooldown and he gains one Tag Team stack. For each Tag Team stack Grimm has, his ultimate cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, and his next ultimate attack deals $amount% more damage, stacking multiplicatively. Tag Team stacks cap at 10 and reset when Grimm uses his ultimate ability.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: For each Tag Team stack Grimm has, his ultimate cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, and his next ultimate attack deals $amount% more damage, stacking multiplicatively

description.desc: 当比德尔在格林的队伍中使用他的杀招时，格林的杀招进入冷却状态，并获得一层“双人组合”效果。格林每有一层“双人组合”效果，他的杀招冷却时间就会缩短 5 秒，并且他的下一次杀招额外造成 $amount% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠“双人组合”堆叠上限为 10 层，并在格林使用杀招后重置。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 格林每叠加一次双人组合，他的终极攻击冷却时间就会缩短 5 秒，下一次终极攻击造成的伤害会增加 $%，并以倍数叠加

description.original: Trust me, friend. You do not want to test me. ~Grimm
description.display: 相信我，朋友。你不会想试探我的。~格林
格林！我干掉一个！~比德尔

description.original: You're no frost giant. This will be easy. ~Grimm
description.display: 你又不是霜巨人。这很简单。~格林

description.original: A hundred of you and just one of me? I like those odds. ~Grimm
description.display: 你们一百个打我一个？我喜欢这样的人数比。~格林

description.original: This is nothing! Beadle's steaks are tougher than this! ~Grimm
description.display: 这不算什么！比德尔的肉排比这还要韧！~格林

description.original: I didn't give up after Trask, and I won't give up now. ~Grimm
description.display: 我在特拉斯克镇事件之后没有放弃，现在也不会放弃。~格林

description.original: Let me make a few practice swings before we get down to business. ~Grimm
description.display: 在我们正式开打之前，先让我挥两下剑练练手。~格林

description.original: Start counting, Beadle. I want to know how many swings they can take. ~Grimm
description.display: 开始计数，比德尔。我想知道他们能承受几次挥击。~格林

description.original: Beadle! Need you over here! No, it can't wait! ~Grimm
description.display: 比德尔！这边需要你！不，等不了！~格林

description.original: If you have a problem with him, you'll have to go through me. ~Grimm
description.display: 如果你要找他算账，那你得先过我这一关！~格林

description.original: Grimm's one of the best warriors around. Don't worry. He'll remind you. ~Beadle
description.display: 格林是最好的战士之一别担心 他会提醒你的 Don't worry.他会提醒你的~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Grimm's specialization choices by $amount%.

description.original: I'm huge. You're huge. We should hang out. ~Grimm
description.display: 我的块头很大，你的块头也很大，我们应该一起玩。~格林

effects.description: Increases the damage of $target by $amount% per Barbarian in the formation

description.original: Let's settle this, one on one. No potions, blades only, neutral ground. ~Grimm
description.display: 我们一对一解决吧没有药水，只有刀片，中立之地~格林

effects.description: Increases the damage of Grimm's ultimate attack by $amount% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating Grimm's ultimate attack.

description.original: Whether giants or dragons, all I need is one good swing.  ~Grimm
description.display: 管他是巨人还是恶龙，我只想要痛痛快快地挥一剑。~格林

description.original: It'll all be over in just one swing. ~Grimm
description.display: 只需一击，一切都会结束。~格林

character_sheet_details.backstory: Grimm's immense strength and steadfast loyalty make him the perfect partner for Beadle's clever schemes. A giant in both stature and courage, Grimm is as at home smashing through foes as he is keeping the Giant's Bane Tavern running smoothly.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Grimm is a DPS, Tanking, and Breaker Champion who thrives alongside his best friend, Beadle. Grimm's damage and armor-breaking abilities intensify as the battle rages on, with specialization choices that let him taunt enemies, find gold, or slay giants.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 格林具有强大无匹的力量和矢志不渝的忠诚，也因此成为比德尔精妙计划的完美搭档。论身材，他魁梧壮硕如同巨人；论勇气，他勇往直前无所畏惧。他既能轻松击溃敌人，也能把“巨人的祸根”打理得井井有条。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 格林是一名输出、坦克和突破者型勇士，与他最好的朋友比德尔并肩作战时，他能发挥出最大的实力。战斗正酣时，格林的伤害和破甲技能会不断增强，通过选择专精，他可以嘲讽敌人、搜寻金币，或者猎杀巨人。

original.description: Grimm cleaves through the nearest enemies with his two enormous greatswords.
